summary:
Step 13 'Expected the 'Próximo' (Next) button of the patient registration form to be visible.' failed. Error: TEST FAILURE

The patient registration did not result in the new patient appearing in the visible patient list or any visible success message.

Observations:
- The right-hand patient list shows other patients (Roberto de Oliveira Cruz, Mariana Rosa Santos, Joaquim Bento Pereira, Carlos Eduardo Almeida, Ana Júlia de Souza) but not 'Test Patient QA'.
- Searches for 'Test Patient QA' and the entered phone number returned no matches on the page.
- After clicking 'Próximo' to submit the form, no success confirmation or new list entry for the test patient is visible in the UI.
